channel.title: Data-Activation on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Activation on Pi Stack

item.title: Multiwoven vs Estuary Flow vs Airbyte: Best Self-Hosted Reverse ETL Tools 2026
item.description: Reverse ETL has emerged as a critical piece of the modern data stack. While traditional ETL pipelines move data from operational systems into data warehouses, reverse ETL does the opposite — it takes your cleaned, modeled warehouse data and pushes it back into the business tools your teams actually use: CRMs, marketing platforms, support desks, and analytics dashboards.
